name: Pursuit Attractions & Hospitality, Inc.
business: Pursuit Attractions & Hospitality, Inc. is a global attractions and hospitality company that owns and operates travel experiences in iconic destinations, including point-of-interest sightseeing attractions, lodges, and integrated food, beverage, retail, and transportation offerings. It draws guests from major markets such as the U.S., Canada, Asia Pacific, Western Europe, and Central America.
sellsTo: U.S., Canada, Asia Pacific, Western Europe, Central America

exposures.sentence: our exposure to cybersecurity attacks and threats, including the impact of fraud; compliance with laws governing the storage, collection, handling, and transfer of personal data and our exposure to legal claims and fines for data breaches or improper handling of such data;

catalysts.event: Agreement to sell Flyover Attractions to Brogent Technologies Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On January 21, 2026, Pursuit entered into a definitive agreement to sell all of its Flyover attractions (the Flyover Attractions) to Brogent Technologies Inc. (Brogent) for approximately $78.4 million in cash, subject to post-closing adjustments (the Flyover Attractions Sale).
